Name: A BlackSwan
Media URL: For you, a million times would still fall short..  Meeting you was a fate, A fate that today has become my most blessed destiny.  With the little time we shared — Ah ! How intensely it lives within me! It's a story I could recount for a decade, Yet never truly complete.  Don't you dare ask me how? Here's what I would say: how not? You took me to a road I could never have reached on my own. Which road was it, and where did you take me?  Oh, don't you dare deny how warm you were with me. Don't you dare deny how much of your heart you poured into — Reading me, Listening to me, Understanding me, And valuing me in ways I had never experienced- –Not even from myself. This is my truth of who you've been to me. And I know you have your own.  But the weight of how I felt– Being treated so dearly by you, Is so profound that I immersed myself in your words– Words that led me to meet my core self. I knocked on my soul's door. Unaware it would open to find a friend–A soul friend, so early and in the most unplanned way.  That knock granted me access: To see how sincerely I could adore, How deeply I could feel, How intensely I could fall, How much of fondness I could hold, And how profoundly affection could draw me, Not to anyone, But to you! Ever since I became human.  Greeting your soul taught me– Who my soul friend could be. And what if I told you– It was with you I ever felt so deeply connected. After experiencing such a gravity toward you. I felt as though we were destined–soulmates.  If only for that fleeting time. Even now, I nurture our connection as one.  I don't know how soulmates are supposed to look, or be. But the way you treated me, The way you made me believe that– I too, am worthy of a soul's connection, That I too, am worthy just as I am, Changed me forever.  You were a balm  to my ever bruised soul. Every gesture of yours felt to me as if I was home– You made me feel worthy of being someone's home, too. A home so profound, I could have settled there for eternity. Ever since then, I've found trust within myself to face life gracefully.  Being seen so dearly by you, I felt adored. And such a never before feeling that I could experience was because of the reason that the person was YOU.  You, who have endured life's most torrential moments. Yet carry a heart so warm That every word you said– In every long and little conversations we had —touched my core. And awakened my soul. Ever since then, you have been living within me.  I don't know if I'm wrong For keeping you at my core, For letting my heart remain constantly connected to you, As I cannot wait for you to come back, and complete our story... But I do know this: You are the only soul I feel so eternally connected to. A flame unfadable...  Yours 3/12/24

Name: JASHAN Sandhu
Media URL: {  ਰੁਬਾਈ }     ਸੂਰਜ ਨੇ ਅੰਬਰ ਰੁਸ਼ਨਾਇਆ,  ਬੱਦਲਾਂ ਨੇ ਮਲਹਾਰ ਸੀ ਗਾਇਆ,  ਹਵਾ ਨੇ ਛੇੜੀ ਤਾਰ ਜੋ ਦਿਲ ਦੀ ,  ਤਾਰਾ ਨੇ ਸੰਗੀਤ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ। ਤਾਰੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਹੀ ਵੇਖਣ ਆਏ, ਚੰਨ ਦੀ ਠੰਡਕ ਸੇਕਣ ਆਏ, ਧਰਤੀ ਦੇ ਸਭ ਹੋਏ ਦੁਆਲੇ, ਸਾਰੇ ਹੀ ਮੱਥਾ ਟੇਕਣ ਆਏ। ਤੰਜੀਫ਼ਾ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਮਨ ਦਾ, ਹੰਝੂ ਭਰਿਆ ਬਰਤਨ ਤਨ ਦਾ, ਅੱਖਾਂ ਫੜਕਣ ਸ਼ਾਨੇ ਕੰਬਣ, ਕੰਡਾ ਕੱਢ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਗਰਦਨ ਦਾ। ਖਿਲੀ ਕਲੀ ਤਾਂ ਪਤਾ ਲੱਗ ਗਿਆ, ਰੌਸ਼ਨੀ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਜਗ ਜੱਗ ਗਿਆ, ਮਹਿਕ ਫਿਜ਼ਾਵਾਂ ਰੰਗੀ ਹੋਈ, ਏ ਫੁੱਲ ਕੁਦਰਤ ਦੀ ਬਣ ਰਗ ਗਿਆ। ਉੱਤੋਂ ਪੈ ਜੇ ਭੂਰ ਜੇ ਕਿਧਰੇ, ਜਾਵੇ ਮੌਸਮ ਘੂਰ ਜੇ ਕਿਧਰੇ, ਅਰਸ਼ ਫਰਸ਼ ਤੇ ਧੂੰਮਾਂ ਪੈ ਜਾਣ, ਹੋ ਜੇ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਦੂਰ ਜੇ ਕਿਧਰੇ। ਆ ਵੇ 'ਸ਼ਾਹਾ' ਸਿਆਹ ਨਾ ਹੋਈਏ, ਖ਼ੁਦ ਦੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਤੇ ਹੁਣ ਨਾ ਰੋਈਏ, ਆ ਨੂਰ  ਪੁਰਨੂਰ ਕਰ ਦੇਈਏ, 'ਸੰਧੂ' ਨਫ਼ਰਤ ਦੇ ਬੀਜ ਨਾ ਬੋਈਏ।                                  ਸੰਧੂ ਸ਼ਾਹ ਜੀ ❣️
